title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
